ENRON'S POWER STRUCTURE: WHAT'S NEXT?

11/04/2001
Reuters English News Service
(C) Reuters Limited 2001.

LONDON, Nov 4 (Reuters) - Enron Corp's (ENE.N) power trading arm, Enron Power Trading, said on Monday it had signed a deal to buy a stake in a new power plant in the United States. 
The company said it had signed a deal to buy a 50 percent stake in the $1.2 billion plant in California, which will be built by a joint venture between Enron and Dynegy Inc. 
The deal is the first major investment by Enron in the United States since it was taken over by Dynegy in August. 
Enron said it would use the money to pay off some of its debts and to fund its trading business. 
The company said it would use the money to repay some of its existing debt and to fund its trading business.
